basic_details.job_title: KKGP HSS Chandimal Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: K. K. G. P. Govt. Higher Secondary School, Chandimal
basic_details.short_information: K. K. G. P. Govt. Higher Secondary School, Chandimal (KKGP HSS Chandimal) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of the institution. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the KKGP HSS Chandimal Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate with minimum 50% marks in respective subject, B.Ed
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (Odia): Minimum 50% marks in Post Graduation in Odia + B.Ed Guest Faculty (English): Minimum 50% marks in Post Graduation in English + B.Ed Guest Faculty (Political Science): Minimum 50% marks in Post Graduation in Political Science + B.Ed Guest Faculty (Economics): Minimum 50% marks in Post Graduation in Economics + B.Ed Guest Faculty (Logic): Minimum 50% marks in Post Graduation in Logic + B.Ed

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 400 per class (maximum 50 classes per month)
salary_details.details: Rs. 400 per class (maximum 50 classes per month)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KKGP HSS Chandimal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts at KKGP HSS Chandimal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Guest Faculty posts at K. K. G. P. Govt. Higher Secondary School, Chandimal is 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate degree with a minimum of 50% marks in the respective subject and a B.Ed degree to be eligible for the Guest Faculty posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Guest Faculty posts is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions will primarily involve Document Verification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the KKGP HSS Chandimal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Guest Faculty is Rs. 400 per class, with a maximum limit of 50 classes per month.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the Guest Faculty posts must be submitted in offline mode.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Guest Faculty positions across various subjects.

faq.question: Q9. Which subjects are recruiting for Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Guest Faculty in Odia, English, Political Science, Economics, and Logic.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of K. K. G. P. Govt. Higher Secondary School, Chandimal, or through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section.
